creator: amistry@am-productions.biz
text:
I really need to get back with it.  I've had a -pre1 patch sitting on 
my harddrive since the beginning of the month :(.
I do have issue with the ruby dependency, though.  It's fine for now, 
but I'll talk with Csaba so the pre2 and future releases include the 
docs pre-built so that isn't necessary.
Commit +1.
-- 
Anish Mistry
